Metadata.title: Hanna Mikulska-Delgaldo | Footwear Buyer
Metadata.description: Fashion industry expert with 5 years of experience as a footwear buyer. Managing production from design to delivery.

Hero.heading: Footwear Production. From Design to Delivery.
Hero.subheading: Fashion industry expert with 5 years of experience as a professional buyer.

Work.title: My work
Work.subtitle: Selected projects and areas of specialisation

items.label: Seasonal collections
items.description: Full-cycle assortment management for SS and AW collections — from design brief through sourcing, sampling, and on-time delivery.

items.label: Asia sourcing
items.description: Building a network of vetted suppliers in Vietnam and China while maintaining quality standards and ethical production practices.

items.label: Private label
items.description: End-to-end private label projects for e-commerce brands — from concept through to finished product.

items.label: Cost optimisation
items.description: Reducing production costs while maintaining material standards and full compliance with technical specifications.

About.title: About me
paragraphs: I am Hanna Mikulska-Delgaldo, a footwear buyer with over 5 years of experience in the fashion industry. I specialise in managing the full product lifecycle — from the initial design brief, through supplier sourcing and production oversight, to the on-time delivery of collections.

I have worked with factories in Poland, Eastern Europe, and Asia, building lasting relationships grounded in quality, reliability, and mutual trust. I understand both the creative side — trends, materials, design — and the operational one: negotiations, production schedules, and quality control.
I believe a great buyer is not just a negotiator — they are a strategist who bridges a brand's vision with market realities.

items.title: Category Management
items.description: Planning and executing assortment strategies for women's and men's footwear collections.

items.title: Sourcing & Suppliers
items.description: Identifying and vetting factories in Poland, Europe, and Asia. Building long-term partnerships.

items.title: Trend Analysis
items.description: Monitoring global fashion trends and translating them into buying decisions aligned with brand DNA.

items.title: Negotiation
items.description: Conducting price negotiations, payment terms, and production lead time agreements.

items.title: Quality Control
items.description: Overseeing samples and production runs. Enforcing quality standards and technical specifications.

items.title: Project Management
items.description: Coordinating production schedules, managing risk, and facilitating cross-departmental communication.

steps.title: Brief & Research
steps.description: Analysing brand needs, reviewing seasonal trends, and defining the collection brief.

steps.title: Design Direction
steps.description: Collaborating with the creative team on shapes, materials, and colour directions.

steps.title: Sourcing
steps.description: Identifying and vetting suppliers and factories that meet quality and ethical requirements.

steps.title: Sampling
steps.description: Approving material swatches and prototypes. Iterating with the factory until the standard is met.

steps.title: Production
steps.description: Overseeing production orders, deadlines, and compliance with technical specifications.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.description: Pre-shipment quality checks, logistics coordination, and on-time collection handover.
